channel.title: Mala on zhouyang — The 25th Frame
channel.description: Recent content in Mala on zhouyang — The 25th Frame

item.title: How to Cook Sichuan Boiled Fish: The Chili Oil Bath
item.description: Editor’s Note: Since launching this column, we’ve heard one request more than any other: the stories are great, but how do we actually cook these? Today we’re fixing that — six classic recipes, dropping at once. Here’s how to make 水煮鱼的正宗做法。 This is the practical companion to Sichuan Boiled Fish: The Dish Whose Name Lied to You — read that first for the story, then come back here to cook.

item.title: Sichuan Boiled Fish: The Dish Whose Name Lied to You
item.description: You walk into a restaurant on Yulin West Road in Chengdu and the first thing that hits you isn’t the noise or the heat. It’s the smell — hot rapeseed oil hitting a mound of dried chilies and Sichuan peppercorns, releasing something between toasted nuts and an electrical fire. The sound arrives half a second later: a violent sizzle that makes every table in the room look up.
